sections.paragraph:
verb לבצור

to gather (grapes) ; to lower (mood)

verb להיבצר

be gathered (grapes) ; destroyed; unable

verb לבצר

to fortify, strengthen

verb בוצר

be fortified, strengthened; surrounded

verb להתבצר

to dig in, fortify, entrench; be allocated

verb לבצר (>>ביצר)

to fortify, strengthen
